long_description: allocstall: Number of direct reclaim calls (since the last boot)
kswapd_inodesteal: Number of pages reclaimed by kswapd via inode freeing (since the last boot)
kswapd_steal: Number of pages reclaimed by kswapd (since the last boot)
nr_bounce: Miscellaneous statistics
nr_dirty: Number of pages that are dirty
nr_mapped: Number of pages mapped by files
nr_page_table_pages: Number of pages allocated to page tables
nr_slab: allocated by the kernel slab allocator
nr_unstable: Number of pages that are unstable
nr_writeback: Number of pages that are under writeback
pageoutrun: Number of kswapd's calls to page reclaim (since the last boot)
pgactivate: Number of page activations (since the last boot)
pgalloc_dma: Number of page allocations per zone (since the last boot)
pgalloc_dma32: Number of page allocations per zone (since the last boot)
pgalloc_high: Number of page allocations per zone (since the last boot)
pgalloc_normal: Number of page allocations per zone (since the last boot)
pgdeactivate: Number of page deactivations (since the last boot)
pgfault: Number of minor page faults (since the last boot)
pgfree: Number of page frees (since the last boot)
pginodesteal: Number of pages reclaimed via inode freeing (since the last boot)
pgmajfault: Number of major page faults (since the last boot)
pgpgin: Number of pageins (since the last boot)
pgpgout: Number of pageouts (since the last boot)
pgrefill_dma: Number of page refills (per zone, since the last boot)
pgrefill_dma32: Number of page refills (per zone, since the last boot)
pgrefill_high: Number of page refills (per zone, since the last boot)
pgrefill_normal: Number of page refills (per zone, since the last boot)
pgrotated: Miscellaneous statistics
pgscan_direct_dma: Number of pages reclaimed directly (per zone, since the last boot)
pgscan_direct_dma32: Number of pages reclaimed directly (per zone, since the last boot)
pgscan_direct_high: Number of pages reclaimed directly (per zone, since the last boot)
pgscan_direct_normal: Number of pages reclaimed directly (per zone, since the last boot)
pgscan_kswapd_dma: Number of pages scanned by the kswapd daemon (per zone, since the last boot)
pgscan_kswapd_dma32: Number of pages scanned by the kswapd daemon (per zone, since the last boot)
pgscan_kswapd_high: Number of pages scanned by the kswapd daemon (per zone, since the last boot)
pgscan_kswapd_normal: Number of pages scanned by the kswapd daemon (per zone, since the last boot)
pgsteal_dma: Number of page steals (per zone, since the last boot)
pgsteal_dma32: Number of page steals (per zone, since the last boot)
pgsteal_high: Number of page steals (per zone, since the last boot)
pgsteal_normal: Number of page steals (per zone, since the last boot)
pswpin: Number of swapins (since the last boot)
pswpout: Number of swapouts (since the last boot)
slabs_scanned: Number of slab objects scanned (since the last boot)
